title: senecio yegua
intro: Senecio yegua, also known as ragwort, is a flowering plant in the daisy family native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Senecio yegua include its ability to treat digestive issues, such as diarrhea and dysentery, as well as its use as an expectorant to relieve respiratory congestion. Herbal preparations of Senecio yegua include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent.
